summary: Camper Card & Roster Enhancements Testing Complete. Backend: 17/17 tests pass. Frontend: All features working correctly. Pickup/dropoff status dropdown, save/clear functionality, and printable roster all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/campers/{camper_id}/pickup-dropoff correctly saves and clears status
GET /api/campers returns pickup_dropoff field for all campers
GET /api/full-roster/print generates printable HTML roster with all required fields
Roster shows camper name, address, AM/PM rider type, pickup_dropoff status, and parent phone placeholder
Print Roster button in sidebar has dropdown with 'All Buses' and individual bus options
Camper info card shows Pickup/Dropoff dropdown with Early Pickup, Late Drop Off, and Early Pickup and Late Drop Off options
Clear Status option appears when status is already set
Current status displays as 'Current: [status]' text below dropdown when set
CampMinder parent phone integration shows 'No contacts on file' as expected due to API subscription limitations
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing camper Jolie Accarino on Bus #14 for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Camper Card & Roster Enhancements feature is complete and working. Backend tests in /app/tests/test_pickup_dropoff_roster.py cover all CRUD operations for pickup/dropoff status and roster generation. Test camper is Jolie Accarino (Accarino_Jolie_11561) on Bus #14. Parent phone numbers show 'No contacts on file' due to CampMinder API subscription limitations - this is expected behavior.

features_tested.backend_set_early_pickup: PASS - POST /api/campers/{id}/pickup-dropoff with 'Early Pickup' saves correctly
features_tested.backend_set_late_dropoff: PASS - POST /api/campers/{id}/pickup-dropoff with 'Late Drop Off' saves correctly
features_tested.backend_set_both_status: PASS - POST /api/campers/{id}/pickup-dropoff with 'Early Pickup and Late Drop Off' saves correctly
features_tested.backend_invalid_status_rejected: PASS - Invalid status values return 400 error
features_tested.backend_roster_all_buses: PASS - GET /api/full-roster/print?bus=all generates HTML for all buses
features_tested.backend_roster_specific_bus: PASS - GET /api/full-roster/print?bus=Bus%20%2314 generates HTML for Bus #14
features_tested.backend_roster_contains_rider_type: PASS - Roster shows AM & PM, AM only, PM only indicators
features_tested.backend_roster_contains_status: PASS - Roster shows pickup_dropoff status when set
features_tested.frontend_print_roster_button: PASS - Print Roster button visible in sidebar
features_tested.frontend_print_roster_dropdown: PASS - Dropdown shows 'All Buses' and individual bus options
features_tested.frontend_camper_card_pickup_dropdown: PASS - Camper info card shows Pickup/Dropoff dropdown
features_tested.frontend_camper_card_save_button: PASS - Save button present next to dropdown
features_tested.frontend_search_functionality: PASS - Search for camper by name works

notes.campminder_api: Parent phone numbers from CampMinder API may return empty due to API subscription limitations. This is expected behavior and shows as 'No contacts on file' in the roster.
notes.roster_html: Roster generates clean printable HTML with proper styling for print media
